The next external repos to downloaded (optionaly? - depends what stage of pipeline is used):
1. DriveLM [for evaluation stage and for working with DriveLM data]
2. fast_reid (for tracker) [for metadata extraction stage]
3. models/SAM [for metadata extraction stage]
4. models/Yolov11 [for metadata extraction stage]
5. models/YoloWorld [for metadata extraction stage]
6. tracker [for metadata extraction stage]
7. nuscenes-devkit [for working with nuScenes data]
